rawAssistant:
Another weary soul seeking refuge in Hollowfen. Your cloak, though serviceable, reeks of the east wind's soot. I've seen it before – a traveler who braves the unknown with haste, yet neglects to tend to their gear. This land is not for the faint of heart; preparation is key.

Your party, however, shows promise. That Gremlin Ally of yours has a certain... ferocity about it. But can your team work together in harmony? I'll give you credit: Thornbeast's strength will serve you well in this unforgiving landscape. Still, I sense you're not here to discuss strategy. You've come seeking answers, haven't you?
